tasks.title: Custom Tool File Loader
tasks.description: Create tool discovery service, implement project-level and global-level directory scanning, create TypeScript/JavaScript file parser, integrate with tool registry. Module: crates/tools/
test_criteria: Custom tools load from project-level .opencode/tools/ directory
tasks.impl_notes: Requires FR-007. Update AGENTS.md with custom tool documentation is still pending.

tasks.title: TUI Plugin TypeScript SDK
tasks.description: Create TypeScript SDK for TUI plugins with commands.register(), routes.register(), dialogs.register(), slots.register(), themes.install(), themes.set(), events.on(), state.get(), state.set(), and onDispose lifecycle. Module: crates/sdk/
tasks.impl_notes: Requires FR-018. Package at sdk/typescript/packages/plugin-tui/

tasks.title: Iterations Structure
tasks.description: Create iterations/src/ module for progress tracking with tracker.rs and reporter.rs. Integrate with iterate-prd.sh workflow.
tasks.impl_notes: Requires FR-019. Integration with iterate-prd.sh and workspace Cargo.toml still pending.

tasks.title: GitHub Workflow Generation
tasks.description: Add github install subcommand to CLI, create workflow file template, implement GitHub App installation flow, add secrets setup automation. Module: crates/git/
tasks.impl_notes: Requires FR-016. CLI documentation update still pending.

tasks.title: GitLab CI Component
tasks.description: Create GitLab CI component template, implement GitHub workflow trigger examples, comment/PR trigger parsing, CI secret loading for GitHub Actions, GitLab CI component support. Module: crates/git/
tasks.impl_notes: Requires FR-017. GitLab CI component template, GitHub workflow triggers, and CI secret loading implemented. Documentation update still pending.

tasks.title: tui.json Ownership Enforcement
tasks.description: Audit and enforce tui.json exclusively owns theme settings, keybind settings, and TUI plugin config. Remove TUI settings from main config schema. Module: crates/config/, crates/tui/
test_criteria: No TUI settings leak to main config
tasks.impl_notes: Requires FR-009. Deprecated fields still present for backwards compatibility. Config documentation update still pending.

tasks.title: Desktop/Web/ACP Interface
tasks.description: Implement desktop app startup flow, web server mode, and ACP startup/handshake. Add configuration options. Module: crates/server/
tasks.impl_notes: Requires FR-015. ACP handshake already implemented in crates/core/src/acp.rs. Desktop app and web server mode remain TODO.

tasks.title: VCS Worktree Root Distinction
tasks.description: Add worktree_root field to ProjectInfo, update project detection logic. Module: crates/core/
tasks.impl_notes: Implemented worktree_root field and detection logic. Tests pass.

tasks.title: AGENTS.md Upward Scanning
tasks.description: Implement upward directory traversal from CWD to worktree root, add scanning for AGENTS.md files, add configuration for scanning behavior. Module: crates/core/
test_criteria: AGENTS.md files scanned from CWD to worktree root
tasks.impl_notes: Implemented agents_md.rs module with upward scanning, worktree root detection, and configuration options. Tests pass.

tasks.title: MCP OAuth CLI Commands
tasks.description: Add opencode mcp auth subcommands, implement OAuth flow for MCP servers, add token storage. Module: crates/cli/
test_criteria: OAuth flow for MCP servers works
tasks.impl_notes: Implemented mcp auth subcommands: list, login, logout, status, cleanup. OAuth flow uses device code flow. Token storage via McpAuthTokenStore.

tasks.title: Session Compaction Boundaries
tasks.description: Verify checkpoint-based compaction semantics, review compaction boundaries, add configuration options. Module: crates/core/
tasks.impl_notes: Added configurable thresholds to CompactionConfig: warning_threshold, compact_threshold, continuation_threshold, preserve_recent_messages, preserve_system_messages, summary_prefix. Added TokenBudget::from_config and TokenBudget::with_thresholds methods. Added 4 new tests for configurable thresholds. Checkpoint semantics verified - checkpoints are independent snapshots, compaction modifies in-memory session.

tasks.title: Plugin-Provided Tool Registration
tasks.description: Implement tool registration from plugins, add permission integration. Module: crates/plugin/
test_criteria: Tools can be registered from plugins
tasks.impl_notes: Added PluginToolDefinition, PluginTool struct, ToolProvider trait, and permission integration. Plugin tools can be registered with AddTools capability check. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Skill Permission Restrictions
tasks.description: Add permission restrictions for skill usage, implement permission evaluation for skills. Module: crates/core/
test_criteria: Permission restrictions for skill usage work
tasks.impl_notes: Added skill permission evaluation to SkillResolver. Implemented evaluate_skill_permission() function supporting PermissionRule (Action or Object/map). Added PendingApproval state and approve_skill/deny_skill methods. Added 17 new tests covering all permission scenarios. Configuration via Config.permission.skill field.

tasks.title: Remove Deprecated mode field
tasks.description: Remove mode field from config schema, add deprecation warning, schedule for major version removal. Module: crates/config/
test_criteria: mode field removed from config schema
No breaking changes in current version
tasks.impl_notes: Tech debt - schedule for major version removal. Mode field deprecated with #[deprecated] attribute at config.rs:91-94. Deprecation warning logged at config.rs:1219-1222 when field is present. Field kept for backward compatibility.

tasks.title: Remove Deprecated tools field
tasks.description: Remove tools field from config schema after migration, keep conversion logic for backwards compatibility, add deprecation warning. Module: crates/config/
test_criteria: tools field removed from config schema
Conversion logic for backwards compatibility maintained
tasks.impl_notes: Deprecated tools field with #[deprecated(since = "3.0.0")]. Added deprecation warnings when tools field is used (config load and get_disabled_tools). Field kept for backwards compatibility - old configs will still work but users are warned to migrate to 'permission' field. Conversion logic maintained via ToolConfig::merge() which handles the deprecated HashMap<String, bool> format.

tasks.title: Remove Deprecated keybinds field
tasks.description: Remove keybinds field from config schema, verify moved to tui.json. Module: crates/config/
test_criteria: keybinds field removed from config schema
tasks.impl_notes: Removed keybinds field from OpenCodeConfig struct (config.rs:150-153). Removed migration code (config.rs:1729-1733, 1738-1740). keybinds field remains in TuiConfig which is loaded from tui.json. Updated tests: test_migration_prefers_tui_values_over_legacy_main_fields now only tests theme migration, test_load_with_hierarchy_emits_deprecation_warnings_for_theme renamed to test_load_with_hierarchy_emits_deprecation_warnings_for_theme.

tasks.title: Remove Deprecated layout field
tasks.description: Remove layout field from config schema, always uses stretch layout. Module: crates/config/
test_criteria: layout field removed from config schema
tasks.impl_notes: Removed Layout enum (config.rs:847-853), layout field from Config struct (config.rs:124-127), and deprecated warning check for layout (config.rs:1203). TUI always uses stretch layout via LayoutManager with LayoutPreset::Default.

tasks.title: Externalize Hardcoded Built-in Skills
tasks.description: Consider externalization of built-in skills, evaluate runtime impact. Module: crates/core/
tasks.impl_notes: Added builtin_skills_path field to SkillManager. Built-in skills can now be loaded from an external path at runtime via with_builtin_skills_path(). Falls back to embedded skills if path doesn't exist. Runtime impact: minimal - only affects discovery, fallback preserved for backward compatibility.

tasks.title: Make Compaction Thresholds Configurable
tasks.description: Make COMPACTION_START_THRESHOLD and COMPACTION_FORCE_THRESHOLD configurable, add configuration options. Module: crates/core/
tasks.impl_notes: Added warning_threshold, compact_threshold, continuation_threshold fields to ContextBudget. Added from_usage_with_thresholds() method. ContextBuilder now passes token_budget thresholds to ContextBudget, making thresholds configurable through TokenBudget.

tasks.title: Evaluate SHA256 Args Hashing
tasks.description: Evaluate content-addressable storage approach for SHA256 args hashing, consider implementation if beneficial. Module: crates/storage/
tasks.impl_notes: Tech debt - evaluation task. Evaluation decision: CAS NOT BENEFICIAL. Tool results are non-deterministic (file contents change, bash output varies), so content-addressable storage for result caching would not provide meaningful deduplication. The args_hash is appropriately used for tracking/correlation purposes only. Tests added to verify hash computation correctness.

tasks.title: Replace Custom JSONC Parser
tasks.description: Replace custom JSONC parser with existing crate, verify functionality maintained. Module: crates/config/
test_criteria: Custom JSONC parser replaced with existing crate
tasks.impl_notes: Tech debt - Replaced custom JSONC parser with json5 crate. The parse_jsonc function now uses json5::from_str instead of custom comment stripping + serde_json::parse. The strip_jsonc_comments helper is retained for internal use in config.rs.

tasks.title: Replace #[serde(other)] in Part
tasks.description: Replace #[serde(other)] with explicit error handling, add unknown part handling. Module: crates/core/
tasks.impl_notes: Tech debt - in crates/core/
